subcodes.first_line: The revelation of the Book from God, the Mighty, the All-Bountiful, is verily the Ancient Lamp amidst the nations and a sign [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تنزیل الکتاب من لدی الله العزیز الوهاب انه لسراج القدم بین الامم و آیه
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power of prayer, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
